title: 🧠 Deep-Learning-Assisted Scanning Probe Microscopy
desc: GNN-assisted quantum fabrication, with Tito Busani's group at UNM CHTM.
summary: Used a graph neural network to analyze scanning probe microscopy data in real time, identifying fabrication paths and reducing overall writing time by ~40%.
note: Poster: R. Pandey, I. Stricklin, T. Busani — "Deep-Learning-Assisted Scanning Probe Microscopy Quantum Fabrication", UNM CHTM. PDF hosting coming soon.

title: 💡 GBS Systems-Level Engineering (NSF NQVL QCAP)
desc: Systems-level engineering for the NSF NQVL QCAP project — control, timing, and readout for a Gaussian boson sampling architecture on integrated photonics.
summary: Part of the UNM-led Quantum Computing Applications of Photonics (QCAP) project. Poster: R. Pandey, J. Dusch, Y. Ngenzi, B. S. Sheelam, K. Pomorski, M. Osinski — "Systems-Level Engineering for Quantum Computing Applications of Photonics: Control, Timing, and Readout in a GBS Sampler".
note: SLE poster PDF hosting coming soon.

title: 🌈 Electrically Tuned MZI-Mesh Photonic Unitary
desc: Electrically tuned MZI-mesh photonic unitary for the QCAP GBS platform — programmable interferometric network under FPGA-based control.
summary: A programmable Mach–Zehnder interferometer network forming a tunable photonic unitary, developed within the QCAP project.

title: 📡 SNSPD FPGA Readout Pipeline
desc: FPGA-based readout for superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors (SNSPDs) — a precision photon-timing pipeline.
summary: Designed FPGA logic to capture and timestamp SNSPD pulses in a multi-stage readout pipeline, developed from senior design into research work at UNM.
note: Conference paper citation forthcoming. Project code is institutional and not public.

title: 📅 UNM IT Scheduling Platform
desc: Full-stack scheduling web app for UNM IT using Django, Node.js, and REST APIs.
summary: Developed a robust scheduling platform with authentication and user management, streamlining IT appointment booking for UNM staff and students.

title: 🤖 Project Orion — Local-First AI Assistant
desc: Voice-controlled offline assistant with gesture recognition, persistent memory, and smart-home delegation.
summary: A Jarvis-style local-LLM assistant: 20/20/20 rule reminders, persistent memory, live browser queries, OpenCV gesture recognition, and planned TTS-synced animations — all running locally.
note: Code release pending a repository security review.

title: 🧬 Agent Survival Simulation
desc: Agents evolve survival strategies against harsh climates, environments, and each other.
summary: An emergent-systems sandbox: populations of agents adapt to shifting climates and competition, exploring evolution and survival dynamics.

title: 🌌 This Website — Orion Star-Map Portfolio
desc: Interactive p5.js star-map homepage, terminal interface, and themed subpages — each star of Orion is one pillar of work.
summary: Telescope-to-Orion intro animation, a working terminal (Betelgeuse), an animated microprocessor projects page, a quantum circuit simulator with Bloch sphere (Rigel), and static-HTML content underneath for machines.

title: 🦴 Eons Survival — Text-Based Geological Adventure
desc: Procedural text adventure set across geological eras, inspired by PBS Eons.
summary: A dynamic narrative engine generating survival encounters with time-period-accurate biology and evolving environments.

title: 📺 Project Umbra — Distributed Ambient Display
desc: A distributed LAN ambient-display system turning idle screens into a coordinated information surface.
summary: Networked devices coordinate over the local network to render ambient scenes and glanceable information.
